entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Commonly known as peanut, the host crop for bacterial wilt

entities.name: BACTERIAL WILT
entities.description: A disease caused by Pseudomonas solanacearum affecting groundnuts

entities.name: PSEUDOMONAS SOLANACEARUM
entities.description: The bacterial pathogen causing groundnut bacterial wilt

entities.name: RALSTONIA SOLANACEARUM
entities.description: A synonym for the pathogen Pseudomonas solanacearum

entities.name: WILD ARACHIS SPP
entities.description: Wild species of the groundnut genus imported from Brazil

entities.name: PEQIA
entities.description: Post Entry Quarantine Isolation Area used for quarantine clearance

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTER
entities.description: The research center where the isolation area is located

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The town where the ICRISAT center is situated

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The state in India where the ICRISAT center is located

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the ICRISAT center is located

entities.name: BRAZIL
entities.description: The country from which the wild Arachis spp. were imported

entities.name: QUARANTINE CLEARANCE
entities.description: The process of ensuring imported plant materials are pest-free

entities.name: HIGH TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Temperatures exceeding 30 degrees Celsius that trigger disease symptoms

entities.name: LATENT FORM
entities.description: A state where the pathogen is present but does not express symptoms

entities.name: TEMPERATE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions under which the pathogen may be transmitted in latent form
